signals.title: Trump name must be removed from Kennedy Center by Friday night as appeals court rejects delay
signals.summary: President Donald Trump had asked a federal appeals court to suspend a lower-court order that his name before removed from the performing arts center.

signals.title: Open Cosmos seeks deadline extension for broadband constellation

signals.title: Trump administration: Iran deal signing likely in coming days, but not '100%' certain
signals.summary: A deal to end the Iran war could be signed soon, a senior Trump administration official said, following recent conflicting statements from the warring nations.

signals.title: House appropriators back $55.5 billion Space Force budget, omit reconciliation funds
signals.summary:
Draft defense bill funds Pentagon at requested discretionary levels but excludes $350 billion in proposed reconciliation spending, casting doubt on Golden Dome and other space programs

signals.title: Small investors scrambled to get in on the SpaceX IPO, even as some believe the valuation is 'stupid'
signals.summary: SpaceX set a fixed price of $135 per share in the leadup to its IPO on Friday, placing its valuation at $1.77 trillion. Shares rallied more than 25%.

signals.title: Top House Republican’s family investment poised to benefit from SpaceX IPO
signals.summary: Republican Rep. Lisa McClain’s husband bought up to $250,000 in Elon Musk’s xAI before it was folded into SpaceX ahead of its IPO.

signals.title: Call Kevin Warsh the Fed 'chairman'
signals.summary: Kevin Warsh's two immediate predecessors preferred to be called the Fed "chair." For Warsh, it's "chairman" of the Federal Reserve.

signals.title: US Army commissions second cohort of tech executives into innovation unit

signals.title: Ukraine’s defense AI chief predicts ‘new paradigm’ of warfare
signals.summary: “The system that possesses more data and better understands that data, proposes solutions — that system will gain the advantage over the other."

signals.summary: The United States reportedly plans to significantly reduce the aircraft and warships it makes available for NATO operations in Europe.

signals.title: Humvee maker AM General to pitch unmanned ground vehicle at Eurosatory trade show
signals.summary: The Ukrainian military aims to contract 25,000 unmanned ground platforms in the first half of this year, more than doubling its 2025 total.

signals.title: SpaceX 'proxies' plunge as real deal arrives: Here's where traders are buying the dip

signals.title: U.S. crude oil falls below $85 as U.S. and Iran near a deal to reopen Hormuz
signals.summary: Oil prices fell Friday after a proposed peace deal that would see the Strait of Hormuz reopen was reported by Iranian state media.

signals.title: Bitcoin climbs back into the green as Trump signals an end to the Iran war

signals.summary: Kharg Island, the linchpin of Iran’s oil industry, has once more come under focus amid a fraying ceasefire.

signals.summary: Pacific Gas & Electric said the milestone comes during an industry shift from “a one‑way grid to an interactive system where customer energy resources are increasingly part of the solution.”

signals.title: Some large Virginia customers face hurdles to using generators for demand response participation
signals.summary: Virginia passed a law encouraging utilities to offer big power users the opportunity to participate in load-shedding programs, but for facilities, signing up is not an easy decision.

signals.title: Solar capacity up 20% from last summer: EIA
signals.summary: Utility-scale solar generation is expected to increase 19% this summer compared with last summer, reflecting a 20% increase in capacity, said the Energy Information Administration.

signals.title: Transmission projects bolster New York, New England summer reliability: NPCC
signals.summary: The region should have adequate resources to meet typical electricity demand, but some areas may need to implement emergency procedures or rely on imports during grid stress, NPCC said.

signals.title: Appeals court upholds FERC decision ordering refunds from MISO transmission owners
signals.summary: Eversource Energy and other transmission owners in New England could see ramifications from the ruling that the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission can order refunds for multi-year periods.
